name: Hot Chocolate Souffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler set over simmering water, melt the chocolate, stirring until it is smooth.
2. Remove the pan from the heat and add the egg yolks one at a time, whisking well after each addition.
3. Whisk in the rum and butter.
4. Transfer the mixture to a large bowl.
5. In a separate bowl with an electric mixer, beat the egg whites with the cream of tartar and a pinch of salt until they hold stiff peaks.
6. Stir one quarter of the egg whites into the chocolate mixture.
7. Gently fold in the remaining egg whites.
8. Spoon the mixture into 6 buttered 2/3 cup souffle dishes.
9. Bake on a baking sheet in the middle of a preheated 400°F oven for 10-12 minutes, or until puffed and a tester comes out nearly clean.
